name: dots
description: This is a sample plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md)

scripts.setup: cd ./test-vault/plugin-dev/.obsidian/plugins/ && curl -L -o hot-reload.zip https://github.com/pjeby/hot-reload/archive/refs/heads/master.zip && unzip hot-reload.zip && rm hot-reload.zip
scripts.install-vault: npm ci && npm run build && mkdir -p "$VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/dots" && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "$VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/dots/"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
